bird.name: 长尾鹦鹉
bird.summary: 长尾鹦鹉（学名：Psittacula longicauda）是鸚鵡科鸚鵡屬下的一種。种加词 longicauda 意为“长尾的”。 描述 雄鸟拥有绿色顶冠，头两侧红色，上嘴红色，具有黑色颊纹，胸绿色，上背浅蓝，尾尖端黄色，两翼淡蓝。雌鸟黑色嘴，髭须偏绿，背上无蓝色。黄色翼衬，黄…

relations.subject: 长尾鹦鹉
relations.evidence: The long-tailed parakeet is able to live in a wide variety of habitats such as in swamp forests, lowland evergreen forest, oil palm plantations, coconut plantations, gardens, public parks, and is a frequent visitor to agricultural areas (especially those who yield tropical fruits and seeds)
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 长尾鹦鹉
relations.evidence: Much of the long-tailed parakeet's natural habitat is threatened by deforestation and illegal logging
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
